venues.name: MetLife Stadium
venues.city: East Rutherford, New Jersey (New York/New Jersey)

gates.name: MetLife Gate
gates.notes: Wheelchair escort from gate on request

gates.name: HCLTech Gate
gates.notes: Near Plaza Level sensory pod and elevator lobby

gates.name: Verizon Gate
gates.notes: Wheelchair escort from gate on request

accessibility.accessible_seating: Wheelchair, low-mobility, and companion seating on all levels
accessibility.sensory_room: KultureCity sensory pods at two elevator lobbies (Plaza Level HCLTech; 3rd-floor Moody's); sensory bags (noise-cancelling headphones, fidget toys, weighted lap pads) at Guest Service booths
accessibility.assistive_listening: Assistive listening via ListenWIFI app; captioning on ribbon boards and concourse TVs
accessibility.vision_support: Braille and tactile signage at elevators and restrooms; audio-descriptive commentary receivers at Guest Service booths; service-animal relief area outside the MetLife Gate
accessibility.elevators: Elevator lobbies at Plaza Level HCLTech and 3rd-floor Moody's, plus all seating levels
accessibility.quiet_route_hint: Enter via HCLTech Gate for shortest path to the Plaza Level sensory pod

services.first_aid: First aid stations on Plaza and Upper concourses
services.nursing_room: Nursing room at Guest Services, Plaza Level

gates.name: Entry K
gates.notes: Escalator-heavy; not recommended for mobility needs

accessibility.accessible_seating: Wheelchair and companion seating on all levels
accessibility.sensory_room: Sensory room near Entry A guest services; sensory bags available
accessibility.assistive_listening: Assistive listening devices at guest services
accessibility.vision_support: Braille signage at elevators and restrooms; audio-descriptive commentary receivers at guest services; service-animal relief area near Entry A
accessibility.elevators: Elevator banks at Entries A and E serving all levels
accessibility.quiet_route_hint: Entry A opens earliest and stays calmest; arrive 90 minutes before kickoff

services.first_aid: First aid at Entries A and F
services.nursing_room: Nursing pod on main concourse near Entry A

gates.name: Gate B
gates.notes: Ramp entry with accessible parking nearby

accessibility.elevators: Elevators at Gates B and D
accessibility.quiet_route_hint: Gate B side is quietest before kickoff; use the ramp from accessible parking

services.first_aid: First aid stations at Gates B and E
services.nursing_room: Nursing room at Gate B guest services
